{{- $current := . -}} {{- /* Build the sidebar from the PRIMARY language's structure (hugo.Sites is ordered by language weight, so index 0 is the default language) and resolve each entry to the current language - or fall back to the primary page with an "EN"-style tag when it isn't translated yet. So every page is reachable in every language. For the primary language itself nothing falls back. */ -}} {{- $primary := index hugo.Sites 0 -}} {{- $primaryLang := $primary.Language.Lang -}} {{- /* Collapsible sidebar sections. Site-wide defaults (params.sidebarCollapsible / params.sidebarCollapsed), overridable per section in its _index.md front matter (sidebar_collapsible / sidebar_collapsed). A section is only collapsible if it actually has sub-pages; the section holding the current page is always expanded. */ -}} {{- $cfgCollapsible := true -}} {{- if isset site.Params "sidebarcollapsible" }}{{ $cfgCollapsible = site.Params.sidebarCollapsible }}{{ end -}} {{- $cfgCollapsed := false -}} {{- if isset site.Params "sidebarcollapsed" }}{{ $cfgCollapsed = site.Params.sidebarCollapsed }}{{ end -}}
{{ range (where $primary.Sections "Params.sidebar" "ne" false).ByWeight }} {{- $psec := . -}} {{- $r := partial "i18n-resolve.html" $psec -}} {{- $sec := $r.page -}} {{- /* resolve this section's collapse behavior */ -}} {{- $hasChildren := gt (len $psec.Pages) 0 -}} {{- $collapsible := $cfgCollapsible -}} {{- if isset $psec.Params "sidebar_collapsible" }}{{ $collapsible = $psec.Params.sidebar_collapsible }}{{ end -}} {{- $collapsible = and $collapsible $hasChildren -}} {{- $startCollapsed := $cfgCollapsed -}} {{- if isset $psec.Params "sidebar_collapsed" }}{{ $startCollapsed = $psec.Params.sidebar_collapsed }}{{ end -}} {{- $inSection := hasPrefix $current.RelPermalink $sec.RelPermalink -}} {{- $open := or $inSection (not $startCollapsed) -}} {{- /* Whether the section's own _index.md shows as a sidebar entry. A section WITH sub-pages usually has a landing/stub _index (its content feeds the "Browse the manual" cards), so its link is hidden by default; a section WITHOUT sub-pages keeps it (the _index IS the page). Flip the multi-page default with params.sidebarIndexLink, or per section with `sidebar_index` in the _index.md front matter (wins). */ -}} {{- $showIndex := not $hasChildren -}} {{- if and $hasChildren (isset site.Params "sidebarindexlink") }}{{ $showIndex = site.Params.sidebarIndexLink }}{{ end -}} {{- if isset $psec.Params "sidebar_index" }}{{ $showIndex = $psec.Params.sidebar_index }}{{ end -}} {{- /* Skip a childless section reduced to a bare (unclickable) header. */ -}} {{- if or $hasChildren $showIndex }} {{ if $collapsible }}
{{ with $sec.Params.icon }}{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" . "class" "cs-side-ico") }}{{ end }}{{ $sec.Title }}{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" "chevron-right" "class" "cs-side-chevron") }} {{ else }}
{{ with $sec.Params.icon }}{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" . "class" "cs-side-ico") }}{{ end }}{{ $sec.Title }}
{{ end }}
    {{ if $showIndex }} {{ $sec.Title }}{{ if $r.fallback }} {{ partial "fallback-tag.html" $primaryLang }}{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ range $psec.Pages.ByWeight }} {{- $rp := partial "i18n-resolve.html" . -}} {{- $pg := $rp.page -}} {{ $pg.Title }}{{ if $rp.fallback }} {{ partial "fallback-tag.html" $primaryLang }}{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ if $collapsible }}
{{ else }}{{ end }} {{- end }} {{ end }}
